actions.name: Regularly update your Terraform configurations to incorporat
actions.description: Regularly update your Terraform configurations to incorporate security patches and improvements.

actions.name: Store sensitive information in a secure manner, such as usin
actions.description: Store sensitive information in a secure manner, such as using AWS Secrets Manager or SSM Parameter Store.

actions.description: Use `.gitignore` to exclude files containing sensitive information from version control.

actions.description: Follow the principle of least privilege when assigning permissions.

actions.description: Use `output` blocks to expose important information about your infrastructure.
